treatment_timeline.event: Right reverse total shoulder replacement performed
Aquacel dressing applied with scant serosanguinous drainage
Discharge medications prescribed including Acetaminophen, Gabapentin, and OxyCODONE

patient_outcome.final_status: Mental Status: Clear and coherent. Level of Consciousness: Alert and interactive. Activity Status: Ambulatory - requires assistance or aid (walker or cane).
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Please call your surgeon's office to schedule or confirm your follow-up appointment in two weeks.
